repo_en:
An attack that deals more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]
new_en:
A spell that deals more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]
zh:
目标单位生命值越低，
造成的伤害越高的一次法术。
[s:.7](基于其生命值百分比)[/s]

repo_en:
An attack that deals even more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]
new_en:
A spell that deals even more damage the less health the target unit has.
[s:.7](based on their health percent)[/s]
zh:
目标单位生命值越低，
造成的伤害更高的一次法术。
[s:.7](基于其生命值百分比)[/s]

repo_en: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.
new_en: Remove all debuffs from a unit.
zh:
移除一个单位的
所有减益效果。

repo_en: Remove all debuffs from units in an area. Those units get +1 [img:divineshield] for each debuff removed.
new_en: Remove all debuffs from units in an area.
zh:
移除区域内单位的
所有减益效果。

repo_en: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it. This has a chance to repeat multiple times.
new_en: Teleport next to a random enemy, then switch to melee stance and automatically attack it. This has a chance to repeat multiple times on different targets.
zh:
传送至随机敌人身旁，
切换至近战架势并自动攻击它。
这有几率对不同目标重复多次。

repo_en: Deal ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 1 that inflicts Slow and has a 15% chance to freeze.
new_en: Deal ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 1 that inflicts Freeze.
zh:
在宽直线范围内
造成冰霜伤害，
造成击退 1，并施加冻结。

repo_en: Deal more ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 10 that inflicts Slow and has a 25% chance to freeze.
new_en: Deal more ice damage in a wide line with Knockback 10 that inflicts Freeze.
zh:
在宽直线范围内
造成更高冰霜伤害，
造成击退 10，并施加冻结。

repo_en: Deal fire damage and inflict Burn 3 to all units in a large circle around you.
new_en: Deal fire damage and inflict Burn 8 to all units in a large circle around you.
zh:
对你周围大圆范围内的
所有单位造成火焰伤害
并施加 8 层燃烧。

repo_en: Deal more fire damage and inflict Burn 5 to all units in a large circle around you.
new_en: Deal more fire damage and inflict Burn 10 to all units in a large circle around you.
zh:
对你周围大圆范围内的
所有单位造成更高火焰伤害
并施加 10 层燃烧。

repo_en: Shoot lightning bolts in eight directions with a 15% chance to Stun.
new_en: Shoot lightning bolts in eight directions with a 50% chance to Stun.
zh:
向八个方向发射闪电，
有 50% 几率造成晕眩。

repo_en: Shoot stronger lightning bolts in eight directions with a 25% chance to Stun.
new_en: Shoot stronger lightning bolts in eight directions with a 100% chance to Stun.
zh:
向八个方向发射更强的闪电，
有 100% 几率造成晕眩。

repo_en:
Damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
new_en:
Damage and inflict Burn 7 on all enemies and light the map on fire. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
zh:
伤害并对所有敌人施加 7 层燃烧，同时点燃整张地图。
施放此法术将会有永久性后果…
[s:.7]（每场战斗限施放一次。）[/s]

repo_en:
Heavily damage all enemies and burn the entire map. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
new_en:
Heavily damage and inflict Burn 10 on all enemies and light the map on fire. There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
zh:
重创并对所有敌人施加 10 层燃烧，同时点燃整张地图。
施放此法术将会有永久性后果…
[s:.7]（每场战斗限施放一次。）[/s]

repo_en:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 5 Damage to enemies and heal each ally 5 HP.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
new_en:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 10 Damage to enemies and heal each ally 10 HP.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
zh:
对除你自己和另一个选定单位
以外的每个单位施加冻结 2。
对敌人造成 10 点伤害，
并治疗每个盟友 10 点生命值。
施放此法术将会有永久性后果…
[s:.7]（每场战斗限施放一次。）[/s]

repo_en:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 10 Damage to enemies and fully heal each ally.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
new_en:
Apply Freeze 2 to each unit except for yourself and 1 other chosen unit.
Deal 15 Damage to enemies and fully heal each ally.
There will be permanent consequences for casting this spell…
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
zh:
对除你自己和另一个选定单位
以外的每个单位施加冻结 2。
对敌人造成 15 点伤害，
并完全治疗每个盟友。
施放此法术将会有永久性后果…
[s:.7]（每场战斗限施放一次。）[/s]

repo_en: Knock back units in an area near you 2 tiles.
new_en: Knock back units in an area near you 4 tiles.
zh:
将你附近某个区域内
的单位击退 4 格。

repo_en: Inflict Poison 1 on all units adjacent to you.
new_en: Inflict Poison 2 on all units adjacent to you.
zh: 对所有相邻单位施加 2 层中毒。

repo_en: Inflict Poison 2 on all units adjacent to you (even diagonally).
new_en: Inflict Poison 4 on all units adjacent to you (even diagonally).
zh:
对所有相邻单位（包括对角线）
施加 4 层中毒。

repo_en: Move up to 3 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.
new_en: Move up to 4 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.
zh:
移动最多 4 格，
在经过的地块上撒布玻璃碎片。

repo_en: Move up to 5 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.
new_en: Move up to 10 tiles, spreading glass shards on the tiles you walk through.
zh:
移动最多 10 格，
在经过的地块上撒布玻璃碎片。

repo_en: Shoot a high damage shot with a 70% chance to miss.
new_en: Shoot a high damage shot with a 50% chance to miss.
zh:
进行一次高伤害射击，
有 50% 几率未命中。

repo_en:
Shoot a high damage shot with a 70% chance to miss and a 50% chance to crit.
[s:.7](This spell has increased range.)[/s]
new_en:
Shoot a high damage shot with a 50% chance to miss and a 50% chance to crit.
[s:.7](This spell has increased range.)[/s]
zh:
进行一次高伤害射击，
有 50% 几率未命中，
50% 几率暴击。
[s:.7](此法术射程增加。)[/s]

repo_en: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value.
new_en: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value. If its HP was a prime number, stun it.
zh:
单位的当前生命值
每有一个唯一因数，
就对其造成 1 点伤害。
如果其生命值是质数，就晕眩它。

repo_en: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value. If its HP was a prime number, gain 5 mana.
new_en: Deal 1 damage to a unit for each unique divisor in its current HP value. If its HP was a prime number, stun it and gain +1 Tech.
zh:
单位的当前生命值
每有一个唯一因数，
就对其造成 1 点伤害。
如果其生命值是质数，
就晕眩它并获得 +1 科技。

repo_en:
You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
new_en:
You and all allies lose 7 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
zh:
你和所有盟友失去 7 点生命值。
召唤一个血肉魔像，
它拥有来自这些单位各一个随机法术。
[s:.7]（每场战斗限施放一次。）[/s]

repo_en:
You and all allies lose 10 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell and random passives from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
new_en:
You and all allies lose 7 HP. Summon a flesh golem with one random spell and random passives from each of those units.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]
zh:
你和所有盟友失去 7 点生命值。
召唤一个血肉魔像，
它拥有来自这些单位
各一个随机法术和随机被动。
[s:.7]（每场战斗限施放一次。）[/s]

repo_en:
{catname} tastes the liquid... it is delicious!

{He} gobbles it up as {his} body mutates!
new_en:
{catname} tastes the liquid... it is delicious!

{He} gobbles it up as {his} body mutates!
zh:
{catname} 尝了尝这种液体……真好喝！

{He}在大口吞咽的同时，身体也发生了突变！

repo_en: Use: A melee attack with a chance to repeat. Gains 1 damage for the rest of the battle each time it's used.
new_en: Use: A melee attack with a chance to repeat. Gains 1 damage for the rest of the battle each time it's used. Refreshes when affected by Electric element.
zh:
使用：有几率重复的近战攻击。
每次使用后，
在本场战斗剩余时间内获得 1 点伤害。
当受到电击元素影响时刷新。

repo_en:
At the end of each battle, all of your stats are permanently reduced by 1.
Spawn 2 Charmed Fly Swarms when you're downed.
If your [img:con] is 0 or less, start each battle downed.
new_en:
At the end of each battle, all your [img:con] is permanently reduced by 1.
Spawn 2 Charmed Fly Swarms when you're downed.
If your [img:con] is 0 or less, start each battle downed.
zh:
每场战斗结束时，
你的 [img:con] 降低 1 点。
当你倒地时，生成 2 群魅惑蝇群。
如果你的 [img:con] 为 0 或更低，
每场战斗开始时处于倒地状态。

repo_en:
Brace {aux}.
Gain -1 [img:int] at the end of each battle, permanently.
This gains +2 [img:shield] and +1 Brace at the end of each battle. 
If your [img:int] is 0 or less, start each battle downed.
new_en:
Brace {aux}.
Gain -1 [img:int] at the end of each battle, permanently.
This gains +2 [img:shield] and +1 Brace at the end of each battle. 
If your [img:int] is 0 or less, you are uncontrollable.
zh:
护甲 {aux}。
每场战斗结束时，永久获得 -1 [img:int]。
此物品在每场战斗结束时获得 
+2 [img:shield] 和 +1 护甲。
如果你的 [img:int] 为 0 或更低，
你将无法被操控。

repo_en: [m:happy]If it was me I'd pose as dog of some kind, just kinda lay there and wait.
new_en: [m:happy]If it was me I'd pose as a dog of some kind, just kinda lay there and wait.
zh:
[m:happy]如果是我的话，我会伪装成某种狗，
就那样躺在那等着。

repo_en: When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield] and refresh your movement action.
new_en:
When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield] and refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This doesn't trigger during your movement action.)[/s]
zh:
当你单次攻击造成 10 点或更多伤害时，
获得 +2 [img:shield] 并刷新你的移动行动。
[s:.7](这不会在你的移动行动期间触发。)[/s]

repo_en: When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield], All Stats Up, and refresh your movement action.
new_en:
When you deal 10 or more damage in a single hit, gain +2 [img:shield], All Stats Up, and refresh your movement action.
[s:.7](This doesn't trigger during your movement action.)[/s]
zh:
当你单次攻击造成 10 点或更多伤害时，
获得 +2 [img:shield]、全属性提升，
并刷新你的移动行动。
[s:.7](这不会在你的移动行动期间触发。)[/s]

repo_en: When you kill an enemy, gain 5 mana.
new_en: The first time you kill a unit each turn, gain 5 mana.
zh:
当你首次杀死敌人时，
获得 5 点法力值。

repo_en: When you kill an enemy, restore all your mana.
new_en: The first time you kill a unit each turn, restore all your mana.
zh:
每回合你首次杀死敌人时，
恢复所有法力值。

repo_en:
4 healing consumables and a full water bottle are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +2 food at the end of each battle.
new_en:
6 healing consumables and a full water bottle are added to your inventory.
You can use consumables on allies.
Store +2 food at the end of each battle.
zh:
6 个治疗消耗品和一个装满的
水瓶添加到你的库存中。
你可以对盟友使用消耗品。
每场战斗结束时多储存 2 份食物。

repo_en:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +1 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun.
new_en:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +2 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun.
+2 Blast Resistance.
zh:
你的爆炸变为电击元素
并造成 +2 伤害。
爆炸不再造成击退，
而是有几率造成晕眩。
+2 爆炸抗性。

repo_en:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +1 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun. Your explosions don't affect allies.
new_en:
Your explosions are Electric element and deal +4 damage.
Instead of knockback, explosions have a chance to inflict Stun. Your explosions don't affect allies.
+4 Blast Resistance.
zh:
你的爆炸变为电击元素
并造成 +4 伤害。
爆炸不再造成击退，
而是有几率造成晕眩。
你的爆炸不会波及友军。
+4 爆炸抗性。

repo_en: Your explosions are larger and deal +1 damage.
new_en:
Your explosions are larger and deal +3 damage.
+3 Blast Resistance.
zh:
你的爆炸范围更大
并造成 +3 伤害。
+3 爆炸抗性。

repo_en:
Your explosions are larger and deal +2 damage.
You have explosion immunity.
new_en:
Your explosions are larger and deal +6 damage.
You have explosion immunity.
zh:
你的爆炸范围更大
并造成 +6 伤害。
你拥有爆炸免疫。

repo_en:
You have Electric immunity.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 1. Gain 1 charge when you are hit with electric damage.
new_en:
You have Electric immunity and are conductive.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 1. Gain 1 Tech when you are hit with electric damage.
zh:
你拥有电击免疫。
你造成的电击伤害增加 1 点。
当你受到电击伤害时，
获得 1 点科技。

repo_en:
You have Electric immunity.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2. Gain 1 charge for each damage prevented when you are hit with electric damage.
new_en:
You have Electric immunity and are conductive.
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2. Gain 1 Tech and become Energized when you are hit with electric damage.
zh:
你拥有电击免疫。
你造成的电击伤害增加 2 点。
当你受到电击伤害时，
变得精力充沛
并获得 1 点科技。

repo_en: Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less.
new_en:
Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less.
+2 Blast Resistance.
zh:
在科技等级 1 或以下时，
总是制作炸弹。
你获得 +2 爆炸抗性。

repo_en: Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less. You can use your basic action an additional time on each of your turns.
new_en:
Always craft a bomb at Tech 1 or less. You can use your basic action an additional time on each of your turns.
+3 Blast Resistance.
zh:
在科技等级 1 或以下时，
总是制作炸弹。
你每回合可以额外使用一次基础行动。
你获得 +3 爆炸抗性。

repo_en: Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped.
new_en:
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped.
If you are wearing metal, your weapon deals electric damage.
zh:
你装备的每件金属护甲使你造成的
电击伤害增加 2 点。
如果你穿着金属装备，你的武器造成电击伤害。

repo_en: Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped. You have +2 Mana Regeneration for each piece of metal armor.
new_en:
Electric damage you deal is increased by 2 for each piece of metal armor you have equipped. You have +2 Mana Regeneration for each piece of metal armor.
If you are wearing metal, your weapon deals electric damage.
zh:
你装备的每件金属护甲使你造成的
电击伤害增加 2 点。
你装备的
每件金属护甲使你拥有 +2 法力恢复。
如果你穿着金属装备，你的武器造成电击伤害。

repo_en: Your explosions inflict Burn 1 and light tiles on fire.
new_en:
Your explosions inflict Burn 3 and light tiles on fire.
+2 Blast Resistance.
zh:
你的爆炸造成 3 层燃烧
并点燃地块。
+2 爆炸抗性。

repo_en: Your explosions inflict Burn 3 and light tiles on fire.
new_en:
Your explosions inflict Burn 6 and light tiles on fire.
+3 Blast Resistance.
zh:
你的爆炸造成 6 层燃烧
并点燃地块。
+3 爆炸抗性。

repo_en: Your basic action inflicts Burn 1.
new_en: Your basic action inflicts Burn 2.
zh: 你的基础行动施加 2 层燃烧。

repo_en: Your basic action inflicts Burn 3.
new_en: Your basic action inflicts Burn 5.
zh: 你的基础行动施加 5 层燃烧。

repo_en: Your basic attack deals +1 Electric Damage and has a 10% chance to Stun.
new_en: Your basic attack deals +2 Electric Damage and has a 15% chance to Stun.
zh:
你的基础攻击造成 +2 电击伤害，
并有 10% 的几率造成晕眩。

repo_en: Your basic attack deals +2 Electric Damage and has a 33% chance to Stun.
new_en: Your basic attack deals +4 Electric Damage and has a 40% chance to Stun.
zh:
你的基础攻击造成 +4 电击伤害，
并有 40% 的几率造成晕眩。

repo_en: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 1, and has a 15% chance to Freeze.
new_en: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 2, and has a 20% chance to Freeze. You can damage frozen units.
zh:
你的基础攻击造成冰霜伤害，
施加 2 层减速，
并有 20% 的几率造成冻结。

repo_en: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 2, and has a 50% chance to Freeze.
new_en: Your basic attack deals Ice Damage, inflicts Slow 5, and has a 50% chance to Freeze. You can damage frozen units.
zh:
你的基础攻击造成冰霜伤害，
施加 5 层减速，
并有 50% 的几率造成冻结。

repo_en: When you cast a spell, deal 1 random elemental damage to adjacent tiles.
new_en: When you cast a spell, deal 3 random elemental damage to adjacent tiles.
zh:
当你施放法术时，
对相邻地块造成 3 点随机元素伤害。

repo_en: When you cast a spell, deal 2 tri-elemental damage to adjacent tiles.
new_en: When you cast a spell, deal 6 tri-elemental damage to adjacent tiles.
zh:
当你施放法术时，
对相邻地块造成 6 点三元素伤害。

repo_en: Tile-targeted spells gain +3 Range.
new_en: Tile-targeted spells gain +5 Range.
zh: 地块目标法术获得 +5 射程。

repo_en: +1 Magic Damage. Tile-targeted spells gain +5 Range.
new_en: +2 Magic Damage. Tile-targeted spells gain +10 Range.
zh:
+2 魔法伤害。
地块目标法术获得 +10 射程。

repo_en: At the end of your turn, Emit a Sparkle for each turn you've taken.
new_en: At the end of your turn, emit 2 Sparkles for each turn you've taken.
zh:
在你的回合结束时，
每经过一个你的回合，
发射两个火花。

repo_en: At the end of your turn, emit a Sparkle for each turn you've taken and gain +1 Kinetic Spikes .
new_en: At the end of your turn, emit 4 Sparkles for each turn you've taken and gain +1 Kinetic Spikes .
zh:
在你的回合结束时，
每经过一个你的回合，
发射四个火花，
并获得 +1 动能尖刺。

repo_en: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana, gain +5 [img:shield] and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes until the end of your next turn .
new_en: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana or HP, gain +5 [img:shield] and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes until the end of your next turn .
zh:
当你以刚好 5 点法力或生命值结束回合时，
获得 +5 [img:shield] 
并临时获得 +5 动能尖刺，
持续直到你的下回合结束。

repo_en: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana, gain +5 [img:shield], heal 5 HP and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes and +5 Damage until the end of your next turn.
new_en: When you end your turn with exactly 5 mana or HP, gain +5 [img:shield], heal 5 HP and temporarily gain +5 Kinetic Spikes and +5 Damage until the end of your next turn.
zh:
当你以刚好 5 点法力或生命值结束回合时，
获得 +5 [img:shield]，治疗 5 点生命值，
并临时获得 +5 动能尖刺和 +5 伤害，
持续直到你的下回合结束。

repo_en: When you end your turn, if you have exactly 4 mana, gain +1 [img:int] and +1 Magic Damage.
new_en: When you end your turn with exactly 4 mana or HP, gain +1 [img:int] and +1 Magic Damage.
zh:
当你结束回合时，
如果你刚好有 4 点法力或生命值，
获得 +1 [img:int] 和 +1 魔法伤害。

repo_en: When you end your turn, if you have exactly 4 mana, gain +1 [img:int], +1 Magic Damage, +1 Kinetic Spikes, and +1 Holy Shield.
new_en: When you end your turn with exactly 4 mana or HP, gain +1 [img:int], +1 Magic Damage, +1 Kinetic Spikes, and +1 Holy Shield.
zh:
当你结束回合时，
如果你刚好有 4 点法力或生命值，
获得 +1 [img:int]、+1 魔法伤害、
